sections.paragraph:
Original: עבתה עבות עבת

Transliteration: ‛ăbôth ‛ăbôth ‛ăbôthâh

Phonetic: ab-oth'

BDB Definition:

  1. cord, rope, cordage, foliage, interwoven foliage
    1. cord, rope, cordage, chain
    2. interwoven foliage

Origin: the same as H5687

TWOT entry: 1558b

Part(s) of speech: Noun
